definitions: To endure a difficult situation or period of time with resilience and determination.
To persist through hardship until a situation improves or is resolved.
examples: She decided to tough it out despite the challenges.
We'll have to tough this out until the economy recovers.
He knew he had to tough it out to achieve his goal.
